question.label: Growth stagnation
question.name: When you say 'growth-wise I'm flat', what's missing — challenge, feedback, or something else?
question.description: Clarifies the specifics of Priya's growth stagnation.

answer: More clarity on scope would help. And hearing about big projects before they're locked in, not after.

assessment.note: Names two specific absences — scope clarity and early project involvement — that signal she is not receiving the growth investment she needs.

new_queue.label: Next steps priority
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked about, what's your priority for the next two weeks?

new_queue.label: Mentoring vision
new_queue.name: What would you like mentoring to look like in your role?

issues: ref_alias q_next_steps_priority_3 not in remaining queue — treating as new

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Cleanup and docs for payments, reviewing PRs for the new team members. Not much stretching me right now.
Nothing big. A lot of context-switching on reviews — probably fine, but it adds up.
I'd like to do more mentoring. I brought it up maybe three months ago and nothing came of it. I'm not pushing.
Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
Honestly — the billing rewrite. I've heard whispers but nobody's talked to me about it directly. That's a bit weird.
More clarity on scope would help. And hearing about big projects before they're locked in, not after.
